attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.CARTON_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.PACKOUT_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.SO_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.SO_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.SHIPMENT_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.PO_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.PACKOUT_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.PARENT_CARTON_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.CARTON_WEIGHT_UOM, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.CARTON_DIM_UOM, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.BP_SERIAL_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.HEIGHT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.LENGTH, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.WIDTH, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.WEIGHT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.DIMENSION_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.CARTON_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.BATCH_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.PROCESS_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.PROCESSING_MODULE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ERROR_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.PROCESSED_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.PACKAGE_TYPE 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON,
 (
 select CARTON_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON
 minus
 select CARTON_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CARTON_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.CARTON_ID and ACM.ORGANIZATION_ID=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.ORGANIZATION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON.REFRESH_DATETIME
